# Read the App Clip Card Image

**Web Service Endpoint**

Get the image that appears on the App Clip card of a default App Clip experience.

## Managing App Clip Card Images

- **Create an App Clip Card Image for a Default App Clip Experience**: Reserve an image asset that appears on the App Clip card of a default App Clip experience.
- **Modify an App Clip Card Image**: Change the image that appears on the App Clip card of a default App Clip experience.
- **Delete a Default App Clip Experience Image**: Delete the image asset that appears on the App Clip card for a default App Clip experience.
